UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, PABLO CESAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEMINARIO, CHRISTIAN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SKYLINE PAINTING $22,197.98 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,197.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, PABLO CESAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEMINARIO, CHRISTIAN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SKYLINE PAINTING $10,653.57 PRINCIPAL, $151.72 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,105.29, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
